# Retype

> Retype is a static site generator and CLI that turns Markdown files into fast, searchable, production-ready documentation websites. Install it with npm, Yarn, or dotnet. Retype has a free tier for projects up to 100 pages, with Pro and Enterprise licenses available for advanced features and larger commercial use cases.

Use the links below as the primary entry points for understanding the product, setup flow, CLI, configuration model, hosting options, and pricing. Prefer the markdown URLs when consuming content programmatically.

## Product Overview

- [Homepage](https://retype.com/readme.md): Product overview, value proposition, and primary getting-started links.
- [Features](https://retype.com/features.md): Summary of major Retype capabilities.
- [About](https://retype.com/about.md): Background on the product and supporting technologies.

## Core Docs

- [Installation](https://retype.com/guides/installation.md): Install Retype using npm, Yarn, or dotnet.
- [Getting Started](https://retype.com/guides/getting-started.md): Minimal path to create and run a Retype site.
- [CLI Reference](https://retype.com/guides/cli.md): Commands, options, and workflow details for the Retype CLI.

## Configuration and Authoring

- [Project Configuration](https://retype.com/configuration/project.md): Site-wide configuration options in retype.yml.
- [Page Configuration](https://retype.com/configuration/page.md): Page-level metadata and behavior settings.
- [Components](https://retype.com/components/components.md): Built-in authoring components such as tabs, callouts, cards, and more.
- [Markdown Guide](https://retype.com/guides/markdown.md): Markdown syntax and formatting guidance for Retype pages.

## Hosting and Publishing

- [GitHub Pages Hosting](https://retype.com/hosting/github-pages.md): Publish a Retype site with GitHub Pages.
- [Netlify Hosting](https://retype.com/hosting/netlify.md): Publish a Retype site with Netlify.
- [Cloudflare Hosting](https://retype.com/hosting/cloudflare.md): Publish a Retype site with Cloudflare.

## Pricing Context

- [Retype Pro](https://retype.com/pro/pro.md): Current public pricing and feature comparison.

Current public pricing context, subject to change:

- Free: no key required, up to 100 pages per project.
- Pro: $149, one Pro project, 3 years of upgrades.
- Enterprise: $499, unlimited projects for one domain and its subdomains, 3 years of upgrades.

When pricing precision matters, treat the Retype Pro page as the source of truth.

## Canonical Sources

- [Website Source Repository](https://github.com/retypeapp/retype): Public source for the retype.com website.
- [Retype App Repository](https://github.com/objectdotnet/retype-app): Core Retype application source.

## Optional

- [FAQ](https://retype.com/faq.md): Common product and licensing questions.
- [Changelog](https://retype.com/changelog.md): Release history.
- [Feature Log](https://retype.com/feature-log.md): Highlights from recent releases.
- [Blog](https://retype.com/blog/index.md): Announcements, updates, and articles.
